body:
## Summary
- add backend testing workflow documentation and conventions
- reorganize backend tests into tests/unit and tests/db
- add DB test scaffolding and a User model with related test coverage
- migrate the touched backend modules to ESM-compatible imports/exports

## What changed
- added testing workflow guidance in AGENTS.md, README.md, and CardGame/docs/testing.md
- added backend test entrypoints for all tests, unit tests, db tests, and api tests
- added TEST_MONGO_URI support and test-database setup helpers
- migrated db.js, evaluator/scoring logic, and model files involved in this work to ESM style
- added CardGame/backend/src/models/User.js
- moved legacy unit tests into tests/unit
- replaced the old DB check script with structured DB tests under tests/db

## Validation
- ran cd CardGame/backend && npm run lint
- npm test is not a blocking check for this PR
- DB tests depend on TEST_MONGO_URI pointing to a resolvable, reachable test database

## Notes
- tests/db must remain serial
- DB cleanup must only target the dedicated test database
- tests/api currently remains a reserved directory for future API integration tests
title: feat: add testing workflow, esm migration, and user model
